prompt: I'm building a FastAPI endpoint that accepts partial updates to a user profile (PATCH). The user has name, email, bio, avatar_url, and settings (a nested object with theme and notifications_enabled). Write me the pydantic models for the request and show how to get only the fields that were actually sent.

assertions.text: Uses model_dump(exclude_unset=True) to get only sent fields
Has a separate update/patch model where fields are optional
Does NOT use exclude_none=True as the PATCH mechanism (exclude_unset is correct)
Uses model_validate or proper v2 methods, not v1 patterns
